validateInput.docs: This endpoint also references CreateInputRequestBase, ensuring the base schema cannot be excluded from the context.

__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    createInput_stream:
      path: /v2/inputs
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      display-name: Create an input
      response-stream:
        docs: ''
        type: InputStreamedResponse
        format: json
      examples:
        - response:
            stream:
              - chunk: chunk
    createInput:
      path: /v2/inputs
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      display-name: Create an input
      response:
        docs: ''
        type: InputFullResponse
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - response:
            body:
              result: result
    validateInput:
      path: /v2/inputs/validate
      method: POST
      docs: >
        This endpoint also references CreateInputRequestBase, ensuring the base
        schema cannot be excluded from the context.
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      display-name: Validate an input request
      request:
        body: CreateInputRequestBase
        content-type: application/json
      response:
        docs: Validation result.
        type: ValidateInputResponse
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - request:
            prompt: prompt
          response:
            body:
              valid: true
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml
types:
  ValidateInputResponse:
    properties:
      valid: optional<boolean>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CreateInputRequestBase:
    properties:
      stream_response:
        type: optional<boolean>
        docs: Whether to stream the response.
        default: false
      prompt:
        type: string
        docs: The input prompt.
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CreateInputMessageRequest:
    properties:
      message:
        type: string
        docs: The message content.
    extends:
      - CreateInputRequestBase
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CreateInputCompactRequest:
    properties:
      data:
        type: string
        docs: Compact data payload.
    extends:
      - CreateInputRequestBase
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CreateInputRequest:
    discriminant:
      value: type
      context: data
    base-properties: {}
    union:
      message: CreateInputMessageRequest
      compact: CreateInputCompactRequest
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  InputFullResponse:
    properties:
      result:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: The full result.
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  InputStreamedResponse:
    properties:
      chunk:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: A streamed chunk.
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Stream Condition Union Test
environments:
  Default: https://api.test.io
default-environment: Default
